title: 'kpod save {image}' shows error, then stack dump
body:
'kpod save {image}' shows an appropriate error message, but the also adds the stack too.  I think just the "refusing to save to terminal...." line would be sufficient.

```
# kpod save 36b3c5f87501 
refusing to save to terminal. Use -o flag or redirect
main.saveCmd
	/builddir/build/BUILD/cri-o-bb1da978e30b3d32f988e30568b5161e8cfd700b/_build/src/github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/cmd/kpod/save.go:68
github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.HandleAction
	/builddir/build/BUILD/cri-o-bb1da978e30b3d32f988e30568b5161e8cfd700b/_build/src/github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/app.go:485
github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.Command.Run
	/builddir/build/BUILD/cri-o-bb1da978e30b3d32f988e30568b5161e8cfd700b/_build/src/github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/command.go:193
github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.(*App).Run
	/builddir/build/BUILD/cri-o-bb1da978e30b3d32f988e30568b5161e8cfd700b/_build/src/github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/app.go:250
main.main
	/builddir/build/BUILD/cri-o-bb1da978e30b3d32f988e30568b5161e8cfd700b/_build/src/github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/cmd/kpod/main.go:90
runtime.main
	/usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/proc.go:185
runtime.goexit
	/usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:2197
```

comments.body: I can’t see skopeo involved. Did you mean to file this against kpod?
Dope slap, yes, sorry.  I'll move this.
Reported against Skopeo and should have been reported against CRI-O.  So many projects, so little time.  Closing this one and have created one in CRI-O.
